# Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New or updated security check
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Tooling / CI / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes locally (format, lint, typecheck, unit tests)
- [ ] Unit-test coverage added/updated for new pure logic
- [ ] Changes are **non-destructive** and stay within the project's safety model
- [ ] New findings conform to the `Finding` interface in `src/findings.ts`
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or commands changed
